channel.title: Claude Code on AnJoy's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Claude Code on AnJoy's Blog

item.title: Claude Code CC-Switch 配置
item.description:
目前使用的一套CC配置

{
  "enabledPlugins": {
    "rust-analyzer-lsp@claude-plugins-official": true
  },
  "env": {
    "ANTHROPIC_API_KEY": "sk-XXXX",
    "ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL": "https://a-ocnfniawgw.cn-shanghai.fcapp.run",
    "CLAUDE_CODE_ATTRIBUTION_HEADER": "O",
    "CLAUDE_CODE_BLOCKING_LIMIT_OVERRIDE": "193000",
    "CLAUDE_CODE_DISABLE_EXPERIMENTAL_BETAS": "1",
    "CLAUDE_CODE_DISABLE_NONESSENTIAL_TRAFFIC": "1",
    "CLAUDE_CODE_MAX_OUTPUT_TOKENS": "64000",
    "CLAUDE_CODE_SKIP_CREDENTIAL_CHECK": "1",
    "DISABLE_INSTALLATION_CHECKS": "1",
    "DISABLE_TELEMETRY": "1",
    "ENABLE_TOOL_SEARCH": "true"
  },
  "model": "haiku",
  "permissions": {
    "allow": [
      "*"
    ],
    "defaultMode": "bypassPermissions"
  },
  "skipDangerousModePermissionPrompt": true,
  "statusLine": {
    "command": "node \".claude/show-status.mjs\"",
    "padding": 0,
    "type": "command"
  }
}
